testcase.name: sendOtpTest
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8080/api/auth/send_otp Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "phone": "+923217566932" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Matched-Stub-Id: 93a79786-d2a6-4882-9c3e-2fe348a41bac Vary: Accept-Encoding, User-Agent Content-Encoding: gzip Transfer-Encoding: chunked
{ "status": "success", "message": "OTP sent successfully", "data": { "otp_id": "123" } }
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: verifyOtpTest
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8080/api/auth/verify_otp Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "otp": "123456", "phone": "+923217566932" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Matched-Stub-Id: 874fbcba-419a-49cf-99e0-607ab807ebd0 Vary: Accept-Encoding, User-Agent Content-Encoding: gzip Transfer-Encoding: chunked
{ "status": "success", "message": "OTP verified", "profile": { "auth_token": "test-token-12345", "user_id": 1 } }

testcase.name: editProfileTest
testcase.system-out:
Request method: PUT Request URI: http://localhost:8080/api/auth/edit_profile Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer test-token-12345 Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "first_name": "John", "last_name": "Doe" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Matched-Stub-Id: 5d600fe6-60aa-48ae-a5c0-60de7ac98807 Vary: Accept-Encoding, User-Agent Content-Encoding: gzip Transfer-Encoding: chunked
{ "status": "success", "message": "Profile updated successfully", "data": { "user_id": 1 } }

testcase.name: listManualInvestmentTest
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: http://localhost:8080/api/stocks/positions/bulk/list Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer test-token-12345 Accept=*/* Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Matched-Stub-Id: 9c8f249e-5c47-430a-9bc8-69a3a6773fd2 Vary: Accept-Encoding, User-Agent Content-Encoding: gzip Transfer-Encoding: chunked
{ "status": "success", "message": "Positions retrieved", "data": [ { "symbol": "AAPL", "quantity": 10 } ] }
